arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Bournemouth – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur host Bournemouth in the Premier League this afternoon. Ange Postecoglou’s side crashed to their 18th defeat of the season in all competitions at AZ Alkmaar on Thursday night. The 1-0 loss in the Netherlands leaves Spurs with an uphill task to progress into the Europa League quarter-finals, ahead of the second leg next […] The post Tottenham vs Bournemouth – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Bournemouth – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Tottenham welcome a Bournemouth side with ambitions for European qualification to North London this afternoon. Spurs have work to do on Thursday night after losing 1-0 in the first leg of their Europa League last-16 tie with AZ Alkmaar. arts.ttl: Djed Spence makes clear Ange Postecoglou statement as Tottenham boss faces crucial week
arts.sum: Tottenham escaped with a 1-0 deficit to take into the second leg in north London next week but Spence believes that not only will they turn it around but that the players are firmly behind Postecoglou. Djed Spence has made it clear that the Tottenham players are firmly behind Ange Postecoglou and believe in what he wants them to do.
